15.kj: age, [phrase] always, [phrase] chronicals, continually(-ance), daily, ((birth-), each, to) day, (now a, two) days (agone), [phrase] elder, [idiom] end, [phrase] evening, [phrase] (
15.dv: from an unused root meaning to be hot;

15.gl: alive; hence, raw (flesh); fresh (plant, water, year), strong; also (as noun, especially in the feminine singular and masculine plural) life (or living thing), whether literally or figuratively
15.kj: [phrase] age, alive, appetite, (wild) beast, company, congregation, life(-time), live(-ly), living (creature, thing), maintenance, [phrase] merry, multitude, [phrase] (be) old, qui

15.gl: to judge, i.e. pronounce sentence (for or against); by implication, to vindicate or punish; by extenssion, to govern; passively, to litigate (literally or figuratively)
15.kj: [phrase] avenge, [idiom] that condemn, contend, defend, execute (judgment), (be a) judge(-ment), [idiom] needs, plead, reason, rule.

15.gl: Jisrael, a symbolical name of Jacob; also (typically) of his posterity
15.dv: from H8280 (שָׂרָה) and H410 (אֵל); he will rule as God;

15.gl: Shemuel, the name of three Israelites
15.dv: from the passive participle of H8085 (שָׁמַע) and H410 (אֵל); heard of God;

16.gl: to walk (in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively)

16.dv: akin to H3212 (יָלַךְ); a primitive root;

16.gl: to revolve, surround, or border; used in various applications, literally and figuratively
16.kj: bring, cast, fetch, lead, make, walk, [idiom] whirl, [idiom] round about, be about on every side, apply, avoid, beset (about), besiege, bring again, carry (about), change, cause to

16.kj: [phrase] avenge, [idiom] that condemn, contend, defend, execute (judgment), (be a) judge(-ment), [idiom] needs, plead, reason, rule.

16.gl: properly, a standing, i.e. a spot; but used widely of a locality (general or specific); also (figuratively) of a condition (of body or mind)
16.kj: country, [idiom] home, [idiom] open, place, room, space, [idiom] whither(-soever).
16.dv: or מָקֹם; also (feminine) מְקוֹמָה; or מְקֹמָה; from H6965 (קוּם);

16.gl: enough (as noun or adverb), used chiefly with preposition in phrases
16.kj: able, according to, after (ability), among, as (oft as), (more than) enough, from, in, since, (much as is) sufficient(-ly), too much, very, when.

16.gl: Mitspah, the name of two places in Palestine
16.kj: Mitspah. (This seems rather to be only an orthographic variation of H4708 (מִצְפֶּה) when 'in pause'.)

17.gl: a house (in the greatest variation of applications, especially family, etc.)

17.kj: [phrase] avenge, [idiom] that condemn, contend, defend, execute (judgment), (be a) judge(-ment), [idiom] needs, plead, reason, rule.

17.gl: there (transferring to time) then; often thither, or thence
17.kj: in it, [phrase] thence, there (-in, [phrase] of, [phrase] out), [phrase] thither, [phrase] whither.
17.dv: a primitive particle (rather from the relative pronoun, H834 (אֲשֶׁר));

17.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
17.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

17.gl: Jisrael, a symbolical name of Jacob; also (typically) of his posterity

17.kj: (begin to) build(-er), obtain children, make, repair, set (up), [idiom] surely.
